text.title: Earned Value Management Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply Earned Value Management end-to-end. Each step names input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: baseline-freeze
step.action: Lock baselines; emit time-phased PV curve.
step.decision-gate: If any baseline not approved, STOP.

step.name: ev-rule-define
step.action: Define EV rule (0/50/100 OR weighted milestones OR %-complete with auditable evidence).

step.name: actuals-collect
step.action: Pull AC per WBS leaf per period.

step.name: compute-indices-and-eac
step.action: Compute CPI, SPI; pick EAC method; emit forecasts.
step.decision-gate: If CPI or SPI <0.85, MUST attach corrective_action_plan.

step.name: report-and-act
step.action: Emit period report with status_color; route red to sponsor; track corrective actions.
step.decision-gate: If indices breach AND no plan, escalate to PMO.
